title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAMES OF MANINGAW AND WASHINGTON STREETS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BILAR, PROVINCE OF BOHOL, TO MARCELO H. DEL PILAR STREET AND MAGSAYSAY STREET, RESPECTIVELY.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3614 / 57 OG No. 9, 1559 (February 27, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2838, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAMES OF MANINGAW AND WASHINGTON STREETS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BILAR, PROVINCE OF BOHOL, TO MARCELO H. DEL PILAR STREET AND MAGSAYSAY STREET, RESPECTIVELY.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The names of Maningaw Street and Washington Street in the Municipality of Bilar, Province of Bohol, are hereby changed to Marcelo H. del Pilar Street and Magsaysay Street, respectively.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
